semantic_parts.root: The native <button> element — owns interactive state, focus ring, padding, sizing
semantic_parts.icon-leading: Optional leading icon (left of label) — replaces with spinner in loading state
semantic_parts.label: The text content of the button

semantic_parts.root: The Menu controller — owns open state and positioning
semantic_parts.target: The trigger element (button) that opens the dropdown
semantic_parts.label: A non-interactive group heading inside the dropdown

semantic_parts.root: The Accordion wrapper — owns variant and spacing
semantic_parts.control: The header — a native <button> that toggles the panel
semantic_parts.chevron: The rotation indicator on the control
semantic_parts.panel: The collapsible region revealed by the control
semantic_parts.label: The control's text content

semantic_parts.outlet: the fixed stack region (mounted once in ClementineDSProvider)
semantic_parts.title: optional bold lead
Optional short heading
semantic_parts.close: Optional close button (only for dismissible variant)
semantic_parts.actions: Optional inline ActionBar for primary + dismiss

semantic_parts.root: The surface container — owns border, radius, shadow, and padding
semantic_parts.section: Full-bleed region (CardSection) — media, headers, footers that ignore root padding
semantic_parts.title: Optional heading inside the card

semantic_parts.trigger: The element the user hovers/focuses (NOT part of the Tooltip component itself; lives in consumer code)
semantic_parts.bubble: The floating container holding the tip text
semantic_parts.arrow: Optional pointer arrow connecting bubble to trigger
semantic_parts.label: Tip text content

semantic_parts.icon: the status glyph (shape differs per status)

semantic_parts.root: The circular container — owns size, radius, background
semantic_parts.image: The user/entity photo when a src is provided
semantic_parts.placeholder: Initials or fallback icon when no image
semantic_parts.group-overflow: The "+N" truncation chip at the end of a group

semantic_parts.root: the padded container on an error-subtle wash
semantic_parts.title: the headline

semantic_parts.root: the padded container on a success-subtle wash
semantic_parts.title: the headline

semantic_parts.block: A single placeholder shape (line, circle, rect)

specs.name: sparkline
required_aria: img role with trend summary label

semantic_parts.box: The visible square that shows checked/indeterminate/unchecked
semantic_parts.label: The text label (clickable target)
semantic_parts.description: Optional helper text under the label

semantic_parts.root: Trigger button that opens the popover

semantic_parts.label: <label> tied to the input via for/id
semantic_parts.root: Outer wrapper that owns the border + focus ring
semantic_parts.icon-trailing: Optional trailing icon (clear button, status indicator)
semantic_parts.helper: Helper or error text under the input

semantic_parts.label: <label> tied to the textarea via for/id
semantic_parts.root: Outer wrapper that owns border + focus ring

semantic_parts.group: Outer wrapper that owns the role="radiogroup"
semantic_parts.label: Text label (clickable)

semantic_parts.panel: <div role="tabpanel"> revealed by the active tab

semantic_parts.dialog: The modal container — owns elevation, radius, focus trap

semantic_parts.track: Outer pill that fills when on
semantic_parts.label: Optional text label

semantic_parts.root: Horizontal flex container holding one or more buttons
semantic_parts.secondary: Outline buttons that sit next to primary
semantic_parts.tertiary: Subtle or text-link buttons for low-emphasis actions
semantic_parts.spacer: Optional flex spacer that pushes destructive to the opposite end

semantic_parts.title: Short verb phrase naming the consequence
semantic_parts.body: Explanation of what will happen + scope
semantic_parts.actions: ActionBar with Cancel + destructive (or primary) confirm

patterns.name: form-field

semantic_parts.label: The <label> for the input
semantic_parts.control: One of TextInput, Textarea, Select, Checkbox, Radio, Switch
semantic_parts.helper: Optional explanatory text below the control
semantic_parts.error: Error message shown when validation fails
semantic_parts.required-mark: Asterisk or (required) text next to the label

components_used: text-input | textarea | select | checkbox | radio | switch
